Tesla made $573 million in sales from SpaceX and xAI last year
snippet: Tesla earned over $500 million from Elon Musk's companies last year.  xAI, his AI startup, accounted for about $430 million. SpaceX, the rocket firm, contributed another $143 million.  This business involved AI chatbots and energy storage.  Tesla also saw revenue from xAI early this year.

title: A new US phone network for Christians aims to block porn and gender-related content
snippet: A new US-wide cell phone network marketed to Christians is set to launch next week.
